data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Success: The rocket launched safely!\nThat's successful launch no. {STR_VAR_1}!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_RocketL:
A rocket launch demands perfection.
Not even a 1% margin of error is allowed.\pEven if it's 99% okay, the whole thing
is useless if 1% happens to be no good.\pDespite that, we never stop trying.
Why? It's a dream that never ends.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_FoundTh: I was taking a stroll down the beach\nwhen I found this.\pIt's not anything I need, so you can\nhave it.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_HoennFa: The HOENN region has been famous for \nits meteor showers for a long time.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_DidPoke: Some people claim that POKéMON came\nfrom space. Could it be true?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Rockets: A giant chunk of metal bursts through\nthe skies and flies into space...\pIt boggles my mind!
